Container.Name: pokecollector-frontend
Container.Overview: PokéCollector Frontend — React/nginx web UI for the Pokemon TCG collection manager. Proxies /api/ requests to the backend container.
Container.Requires: pokecollector-backend must be running. Both containers must be in the br0.3 macvlan network with fixed IPs.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the PokéCollector web interface.

Config.Name: BACKEND_HOST
Config.Description: IP-Adresse des pokecollector-backend Containers. nginx leitet /api/-Anfragen an http://BACKEND_HOST:8000 weiter.
